pageDescription: Cookie policy for Sebastián Tamayo's website. Learn which cookies we use, their purpose, and how to manage your consent.
content:
# Cookie Policy

**Website:** tasy.work  
**Responsible Party:** Sebastián Tamayo — home@tasy.work  
**Last updated:** June 2025

---

## 1. What are cookies?

Cookies are small text files that a website stores in the user's browser when they visit. They allow the site to remember information about the visit, such as browsing preferences or behavior within the site.

## 2. Legal framework

Colombia does not have a specific law on cookies. However, when cookies collect data that can identify a person, **Law 1581 of 2012** on Personal Data Protection and **Decree 1074 of 2015** apply. Consequently, the use of analytical and behavioral cookies on this site requires **prior, express, and informed consent** from the user.

## 3. Cookies we use

### 3.1 Necessary cookies (no consent required)

These cookies are essential for the basic functioning of the site. They do not collect identifiable personal data.

| Cookie | Provider | Purpose | Duration |
|---|---|---|---|
| Session cookies | tasy.work | Maintain user session state | Session |

### 3.2 Analytical and behavioral cookies (consent required)

These cookies collect information about how users interact with the site: pages visited, clicks, scrolling, and time spent. They are used to improve the site experience and understand visitor behavior.

| Cookie | Provider | Purpose | Duration |
|---|---|---|---|
| _clck | Microsoft Clarity | Identify unique users and behavioral sessions | 1 year |
| _clsk | Microsoft Clarity | Record activity in the current session | 1 day |
| CLID | Microsoft Clarity | Store user identification data for analysis | 1 year |
| _ga | Google (via GTM) | Identify unique users in Google Analytics | 2 years |
| _gid | Google (via GTM) | Distinguish users between sessions | 24 hours |
| _gtm_* | Google Tag Manager | Manage and activate tracking tags | Variable |

## 4. Consent

Upon first visiting the site, a cookie banner will be displayed where you can:

- **Accept** all cookies, including analytical ones.
- **Reject** non-essential cookies, in which case only necessary cookies will be activated.

Analytical tools (Microsoft Clarity, GTM) **are not activated until the user gives consent**, in compliance with Google Consent Mode v2.

## 5. How to withdraw or manage consent

You can change your preference at any time:

- Through the **cookie preferences panel** available in the site footer.
- By configuring your **browser** to block or delete cookies. Major browsers allow this from their privacy settings:
  - [Chrome](https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95647)
  - [Firefox](https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/clear-cookies-and-site-data-firefox)
  - [Safari](https://support.apple.com/guide/safari/sfri11471/mac)
  - [Edge](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/delete-cookies-in-microsoft-edge-63947406-40ac-c3b8-57b9-2a946a29ae09)

Please note that disabling analytical cookies does not affect site functionality.

## 6. International data transfer

Microsoft Clarity and Google Tag Manager process data on servers located outside Colombia. These transfers are carried out under the terms of their respective privacy policies, which include adequate protection mechanisms according to international standards.

## 7. Updates

This policy may be modified when new tracking tools are incorporated or applicable legal provisions change. The current version will always be available at **tasy.work/en/cookies**.

---

*Questions: **home@tasy.work***
